title: Monsoon Moist Moroccan Chickpeas Tagine
description: This Moroccan tagine is a hearty and flavorful stew made with chickpeas, dark chocolate chips, and bhuna spice blend, perfect for a monsoon evening. It is an ovo-vegetarian friendly dish that combines earthy and sweet flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the bhuna spice blend and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, dark chocolate chips, tomato paste, and vegetable broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
Crack in the eggs and stir gently to distribute them evenly throughout the tagine.
Season the tagine with salt and black pepper to taste.
Continue to cook, covered, for an additional 10 minutes, until the eggs are cooked through and the tagine has thickened slightly.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
